operation.name: write_at_kbmi_pre_routing_hook
preconditions:
(set-logic QF_AUFBV )
(declare-fun filler_byte () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(declare-fun sep_pos () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(declare-fun shellcode_byte () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(assert
        (and 
             (and 
                  (bvult 
                         (concat 
                                 (select 
                                         sep_pos
                                         (_ bv7 32)
                                 )
                                 (concat 
                                         (select 
                                                 sep_pos
                                                 (_ bv6 32)
                                         )
                                         (concat 
                                                 (select 
                                                         sep_pos
                                                         (_ bv5 32)
                                                 )
                                                 (concat 
                                                         (select 
                                                                 sep_pos
                                                                 (_ bv4 32)
                                                         )
                                                         (concat 
                                                                 (select 
                                                                         sep_pos
                                                                         (_ bv3 32)
                                                                 )
                                                                 (concat 
                                                                         (select 
                                                                                 sep_pos
                                                                                 (_ bv2 32)
                                                                         )
                                                                         (concat 
                                                                                 (select 
                                                                                         sep_pos
                                                                                         (_ bv1 32)
                                                                                 )
                                                                                 (select 
                                                                                         sep_pos
                                                                                         (_ bv0 32)
                                                                                 )
                                                                         )
                                                                 )
                                                         )
                                                 )
                                         )
                                 )
                         )
                         (_ bv1023 64)
                  )
                  (= 
                     (_ bv144 8)
                     (select 
                             shellcode_byte
                             (_ bv0 32)
                     )
                  )
             )
             (= 
                false
                (= 
                   (_ bv0 8)
                   (select 
                           filler_byte
                           (_ bv0 32)
                   )
                )
             )
        )
)
(check-sat)
(exit)

metadata.bug_type: CWE-787 (OOB_WRITE): Array index write where index is a length-like value (off-by-one / past-last-byte)
